zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange於1163年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉時，他的父親Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange26歲，母親Thiburge de Montpellier22歲。他與Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1201年在法國布-度-o麥拉格斯享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange于1163年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉时，他的父亲Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange26岁，母亲Thiburge de Montpellier22岁。他与Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1201年在法国布-度-o麥拉格斯享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Alsace and Lorraine): from a shortened form of the German personal name   Debus  .

variants.name: Debus
meanings: German: from a personal name, a vernacular short form of Matthäus (see Matthew ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine); compare Debs .
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of various places called Bus (from a regional form of bois ‘wood’) in Eure, Pas-de-Calais, and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Bertrand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French variant of   Bertram  , imported to Britain by the Normans. In modern times it has been made famous by the English philosopher  Bertrand Russell  (  1872–1970 ), but is only in occasional use.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange was born in 1163, in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, his father, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, was 26 and his mother, Thiburge de Montpellier, was 22. He married Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1201, in Meyrargues, Bouches-du-Rhône, France, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange est né en 1163, à Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Thiburge de Montpellier, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1201, à Meyrargues, Bouches-du-Rhône, France, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, P: La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange 1163 in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange 26 und seine Mutter Thiburge de Montpellier 22. Er hat Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1201 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Meyrargues, Bouches-du-Rhône, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange è nato il nel 1163 nel Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, il suo padre, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Thiburge de Montpellier, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1201, nel Meyrargues, Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orangeが1163年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼオランッジで生まれた時，父Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orangeは26歳，母Thiburge de Montpellierは22歳であった。Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1201年にフランスボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンメイラルグスで39歳で死去した。

ko.La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, P: 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 라 로크-드'아스e런
ko.lifeSummary: Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange(이)가 1163년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바c루스 오랑에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Thiburge de Montpellier(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1201년 프랑스 부체스-드-ho니 이라르구스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange nasceu em 1163, em Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Thiburge de Montpellier, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1201, em Meyrargues, Bouches-du-Rhône, França, com 39 anos.

ro.La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, P: La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Franţa

ru.La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, P: ла рокуе-д'антeрон, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange родился в 1163 г. в местности оранг, вауклус, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, его отцу по имени Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Thiburge de Montpellier, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1201 г. в местности мираргуесь, боучес-ду-рoн, Франция в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertrand II des Baux-d'Orange nació en 1163, en Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Thiburge de Montpellier, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ermengarz de Mévouillon de Sabran. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1201, en Meyrargues, Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia, a la edad de 39 años.
